title: Support consecutive repetition [*N] in SVA properties

features.name: SVA consecutive repetition [*N] with fixed count
features.description: Code should include an SVA property expression using consecutive repetition operator [*N] with a constant positive integer count to specify that a sequence or expression repeats exactly N consecutive clock cycles
features.snippet:
logic clk, a, b;
assert property (@(posedge clk) a[*3] |-> b);

features.name: SVA property with overlapped implication |->
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property with overlapped implication operator |-> where the antecedent and consequent are evaluated on the same clock cycle after the antecedent sequence completes
features.snippet:
logic clk, a, b;
assert property (@(posedge clk) a[*3] |-> b);
